title: verbascum interruptum
intro: Verbascum interruptum, also known as Cut-leaved Mullein, is a biennial plant species belonging to the figwort family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe coughs and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Verbascum interruptum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of colds, bronchitis, and skin conditions. Verbascum interruptum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and valuable addition to natural remedies.
